hooks.command: added=$(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=A 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^packages/app-tauri/src/(features|surfaces|components)/' | tr '\n' ' '); if [ -n "$added" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"New app-tauri component/module staged: %s — before considering it done, review the new code with the /thermo-nuclear-code-quality-review skill AND the design-conformance agent."}}' "$added"; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking new app-tauri components for review…
